name: Wight

traits.name: Resistances
traits.text: Acid, Bludgeoning, Cold, Fire, Necrotic, Piercing, Slashing

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Lightning, Poison; Exhaustion, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Prone, Restrained, Unconscious

traits.name: Ephemeral
traits.text: The wisp can’t wear or carry anything.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The wisp sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.text: The wisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

text:
# Wight

*Tiny Undead, Chaotic Evil*

### Actions

**Shock.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) Lightning damage.

**Consume Life.** Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, one living creature the wisp can see within 5 feet that has 0 Hit Points. Failure: The target dies, and the wisp regains 10 (3d6) Hit Points.
